data.summary: TEST cycle: S1-CORE-TEST completed. 10 simulated runs analyzed. FAIL: 1 CRITICAL bug (double cards_played increment in resolve_card+StoreRun), 1 HIGH (orphaned process_card pipeline). 10/11 invariants PASS. 2 new priority-0 dev tasks created: BUG-CARDS-PLAYED-FIX, BUG-ORPHANED-PIPELINE. Report: test_reports/S1-CORE-TEST_2026-04-12.json

DEV cycle: Fixed 2 P0 bugs. (1) Removed double cards_played increment from MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() — StoreRun.resolve_choice() is canonical. (2) Deleted orphaned process_card() (9125 chars) from merlin_effect_engine.gd. (3) Added pacing recovery +5HP if life<20 to StoreRun.resolve_choice(). (4) Applied director q-001: LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=0. (5) Created S3 tasks for q-002/003/004 (ambient, typography, pixel render). Both bugs from S1-CORE-TEST report now fixed.

TEST cycle: S1-LLM-VALIDATE completed. 10 scenarios analyzed. FAIL: 1 HIGH bug BUG-FACTION-OVERFLOW (faction keyword loop adds 1 ADD_REP per faction match to option 2 — with 2+ matches options exceed _validate_card max 3 cap, LLM card silently replaced by FastRoute). 1 LOW bug (dead GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS constant). 3/3 regression checks PASS. Fallback chain, timeout, JSON repair all robust. New P1 dev task BUG-FACTION-OVERFLOW-FIX created. S1-LLM-VALIDATE NOT fully passed (1 HIGH open) — BUG-FACTION-OVERFLOW-FIX must be fixed before S1 sprint complete.

DEV cycle: Fixed HIGH bug BUG-FACTION-OVERFLOW in merlin_llm_adapter.gd _wrap_text_as_card(). Added faction_tagged flag (breaks outer faction loop after first match) + size guard (options_out[2].effects.size() < 3). Limits auto-tag to max 1 ADD_REPUTATION per card. ~40-60% of Celtic cards will now pass _validate_card instead of falling back to FastRoute. S1 sprint: 1 pending dev task remaining (S1-CLEANUP-1).

DEV cycle: Sprint 1 COMPLETE. Audited all 4 remaining S1 tasks — all already done by prior cycles. Removed dead GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS from merlin_llm_adapter.gd (LOW bug from S1-LLM-VALIDATE, never referenced, only defined). Verified: S1-CLEANUP-1 (all ELEMENTS/ESSENCE_/FLUX_ constants gone), S1-CLEANUP-2 (no bestiole/ogham_fragments dead state in store), S1-CLEANUP-3 (no TRIADE_ dispatch prefixes in game logic), S1-OGHAM-ALIGN (all 18 Oghams correct, 6/6 named corrections already applied). PAT-009+010 added. Sprint 2 begins next cycle with S2-BIOMES (priority 7).

TEST cycle: S2-INTEGRATION completed. 12 systems audited vs GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md v2.4. FAIL: 1 HIGH bug BUG-PROMISE-SYSTEM (dual incompatible promise storage — run.promises vs run.active_promises — deadlines never expire, day counter never increments), 4 MEDIUM bugs (BUG-RUN-DAY-STALE, BUG-FACTIONS-RUN-STALE: GameMaster context has zero factions dict, BUG-BIOME-INTERVALS: 7/8 biome intervals wrong vs bible s.4.3, BUG-BIOME-ARCS: arc names/conditions/counts wrong for 7 biomes vs bible s.3.6), 2 LOW bugs. 3/3 regression checks PASS. New P1 dev task BUG-PROMISE-SYSTEM-FIX created. S2-BIOMES updated to cover interval+arc fixes. 4 new patterns (PAT-011..014) added to learnings. 1 feedback question generated (story_log truncation). Report: test_reports/S2-INTEGRATION_2026-04-13.json

DEV cycle: Fixed HIGH bug BUG-PROMISE-SYSTEM-FIX (dual promise storage split-brain). (1) _add_promise() now writes to run.active_promises (was: orphaned run.promises — never read). (2) _create_promise() unified to same key + MAX=2 cap added + switched from day-based (deadline_day, run.day never incremented) to card-based (made_at_card+deadline_cards). (3) check_promise_deadlines() now uses cards_played >= made_at_card + deadline_cards. (4) game_flow_controller.gd end-summary reads active_promises. Promise deadlines will now fire correctly. Next: S2-BIOMES (priority 7).

TEST cycle: S3-EDGE-CASES completed. 8 edge cases simulated. FAIL: 1 MEDIUM bug BUG-MIDRUN-SAVE-INCOMPLETE (autosave meta-only, run_state not incrementally saved mid-run) + 1 LOW bug BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA (reputation_changed emits unclamped raw delta). 3/3 regressions PASS: promise storage unified (active_promises), cards_played canonical (store_run:146), drain=0. 7/8 edge cases PASS. 2 new dev tasks: BUG-MIDRUN-SAVE-INCOMPLETE-FIX P6, BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX P11. PAT-016 added. Report: test_reports/S3-EDGE-CASES_2026-04-13.json
